The king should raise the Standard to the accompaniment of
the unceasing shouts of the people drowning the inauspicious sounds
through the auspicious benedictions and invocations, the loud
sounds of drams, tabors, conchs, kettle-drums etc., and through the
repeated loud chantings of Vedic hymns by Brahmanas.
[In the fourth line there is another reading. for
am- which is evidently an emendation by a later scholar.
The metre of this and of the following verse is mfbfT.]
